nasb.text: Only fear the Lord and serve Him in truth with all your heart; for consider what great things He has done for you.

esv.text: Only fear the Lord and serve him faithfully with all your heart. For consider what great things he has done for you.

cnv.text: 你們只要敬畏耶和華，誠實全心事奉他，因為你們已經看過他為你們所作的是何等大的事。

ccb.text: 你们要单单敬畏耶和华，全心全意地事奉他，想想他为你们做了何等伟大的事。
